summary: Real ctrl+r keypress with no down tasks asserts screen_stack stays 1 and captured push_screen is empty; parametrized over every non-down status (incl. failed/disconnected/terminal '–') and an empty snapshot, with a snapshot-swap proving confirmation reads the latest fetch — a sibling test shows the same keypress does open BulkRespawnScreen when a down task exists, so the no-modal assertions are behavioral, not vacuous
